spec.long_desc: A large spider descends from the web canopy above, its legs spread wide.
spec.detailed_desc: The spider is roughly the size of a large cat, its abdomen a dark reddish-brown with pale markings that may or may not be significant. It moves with the liquid, boneless efficiency of its kind — all legs and no wasted motion. Its chelicerae are visible from several feet away and the venom that beads at their tips carries a smell faintly detectable as something chemical and unpleasant.
